overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt trail through dense wilderness at night, illuminated by flashlight. The environment features tall grass, bushes, and scattered trees under a completely dark sky, rendered in a game engine.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight beam. A large dense bush dominates the right side of the path while tall grass lines the left. The sky is pitch black and the surroundings are quiet and empty.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with scattered trees and thick undergrowth

events.description: a leaning tree becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail through increasingly wooded terrain

entered.detail: small tree with thin trunk on the right side of the trail
slender tree leaning over the left side of the path
thick bushes and forest vegetation lining the right side

segments.scene_description: The trail continues into a more wooded area after passing the large bush. A small tree appears on the right, followed by a distinctive leaning tree on the left. The flashlight reveals dense forest undergrowth on both sides as the path winds through the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a narrow dirt trail that transitions from an open, grassy path into a denser wooded wilderness. It begins with a flashlight beam cutting through the pitch-black night, illuminating a large dense bush on the right and tall grass lining the left. As the camera moves past the bush, the trail winds forward and the environment shifts into a more enclosed forest setting. The scene then opens up to reveal a small tree on the right followed by a distinctive leaning tree on the left, with the flashlight exposing thick undergrowth on both sides of the path. Finally, the camera continues deeper into the wilderness, moving through the increasingly crowded trees under a completely dark sky.
